mapper.sql: p.id, p.title, p.fenlei_id, p.content, p.require_time, p.fee, p.cover, p.user_id, p.shangjia_id, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, f.name as fenlei_name, u.name as user_name, s.name as shangjia_name
mapper.select: select from paotuixiangmu p left join paotuifenlei f on p.fenlei_id = f.id left join user u on p.user_id = u.id left join shangjia s on p.shangjia_id = s.id where p.id = #{id}

select from paotuixiangmu p left join paotuifenlei f on p.fenlei_id = f.id left join user u on p.user_id = u.id left join shangjia s on p.shangjia_id = s.id where p.status = 0
and (p.title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or p.content like concat('%',#{keyword},'%'))
and p.fenlei_id = #{fenleiId} order by p.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into paotuixiangmu (title, fenlei_id, content, require_time, fee, cover, user_id, shangjia_id, status, create_time) values (#{title}, #{fenleiId}, #{content}, #{requireTime}, #{fee}, #{cover}, #{userId}, #{shangjiaId}, #{status}, now())

insert into paotuixiangmu
title, fenlei_id, content, require_time, fee, cover, user_id, shangjia_id, status, create_time,
#{title}, #{fenleiId}, #{content}, #{requireTime}, #{fee}, #{cover}, #{userId}, #{shangjiaId}, #{status}, now(),
